name: Mambo The Kitten
description: Mambo The Kitten (KITTEN) is a Kaspa-based KRC-20 community token designed to explore ecosystem growth, token distribution, and future utility. Originally inspired by a real kitten, the project now operates as a transparent experiment in community rewards, liquidity strategies, and emerging Kaspa infrastructure.

policy.minting: No further minting. Full supply created at launch due to initial conditions.
policy.distribution: Community-focused redistribution through incentives, airdrops, and ecosystem participation.
policy.burns: Optional milestone-based burns to support long-term scarcity.
policy.liquidity: Liquidity added incrementally in line with project milestones and community growth.
policy.migration: Potential 1:1 migration if future Kaspa smart contract or L2 infrastructure enables expanded functionality.
